metadata.description: Multi-model second-opinion deliberation for high-stakes coding decisions. Five skills route your agent to TruVerifAI's MCP server (audit / deliberate / synthesize / record-outcome / skip-gate), plus proactive PreToolUse review gates that prompt an audit before risky commits and a deliberation or synthesize before risky design changes.

plugins.name: panel-review
plugins.description: Multi-model second-opinion deliberation for high-stakes coding decisions
